headline: Mastercard Tightens Fraud Rules And AI Tools As Share Price Slips
summary: Mastercard has launched new AI-powered Merchant Trust Services to help assess and monitor merchant legitimacy across its network. The company introduced a Merchant Scam & Risk Indicator system to help banks and payment providers flag potentially fraudulent merchants earlier. From July, Mastercard will apply tighter fraud monitoring rules that require quicker investigation of suspicious merchant activity. For investors watching NYSE:MA, this move adds a fresh operational development on top...
